data.name: Intro
data.value: This area contains platform-wide controls. Use these shortcuts for settings, governance, and operational management.

data.name: GeneralSettingsDescription
data.value: Toggle self-registration and other application-wide policies.

data.name: UsageLimitsDescription
data.value: Configure instance-wide limits for tenants, workspaces, documents, storage, and optional capabilities.

data.name: SystemHealthDescription
data.value: Check required services and optional capabilities.

data.name: UsersDescription
data.value: Review all users, roles, and activation state from one place.

data.name: HostedModelsDescription
data.value: Maintain hosted models available to users.

data.name: TenantsDescription
data.value: Inspect and edit all tenant entities in the platform.

data.name: UserInvitationsDescription
data.value: Invite users when self-registration is disabled, then track invitation status.
